channel.title: Blogs on Fan Zhang
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Fan Zhang

item.title: Algebraic Sturcture 101
item.description: Group Group Group: A group is a non-empty set $G$ with binary operation satisfying: Identity: exists $e \in G$ such as $ea = ae = a$ Inverse: for each $a \in G$, exists a $b \in G$ such as $ab = ba = e$ Associative: for all $a, b, c \in G$, we have $a(bc) = (ab)c$ Properties: Uniqueness of the identity: There is only one identity element Cancellation in a group: If $ab=ac$ or $ba=ca$, $b=c$ $$ ab = cb \

item.title: All About Chord Master
item.description: What are you building? Chord Master is a web application that helps musicians find chords and create chord progressions. It helps you find chords that work together. Chords in the progression are represented by the lead sheet symbol. To build a chord, you can click the + button to add a chord, select the chord type and inversion in the dropdown menu, and choose the root note by clicking its key on the keyboard interface.

item.title: Chungking Express: Hong Kong’s Identity of Becoming
item.description: Chungking Express tells juxtaposing two stories of urban lives and modern loves. Both stories’ protagonists work as a cop; Both stories are about their struggle to cope with the loss of their ex-girlfriend respectively. In this approach, the director Wang Kai Wai uses the mutability of the individual identity to indicate the uncertainty of Hong Kong identity. Hong Kong’s social-politics is frustrating through the city’s transition from colonialism to post-colonialism; Its cultural identity is disguised with the popularity of US culture in Hong Kong.
